name: playwright-cli
description: Browser automation via CLI — navigate, click, fill, snapshot, screenshot, test, and debug web pages.

methods.name: npm
methods.command: npm install -g @playwright/cli@latest && npx playwright install chromium

integration_test.command: playwright-cli open https://example.com && playwright-cli snapshot && playwright-cli close
integration_test.description: Opens a browser, takes a snapshot, and closes — requires a display or headless support
